creator: fuz@FreeBSD.org
text:
Your patch fails during patching:

===>  Extracting for coccinelle-1.3
=> SHA256 Checksum OK for coccinelle-1.3.tar.gz.
=> SHA256 Checksum OK for thierry-martinez-stdcompat-d53390d788027fe0a2282c4745eb3d1626341f99_GH0.tar.gz.
===>   coccinelle-1.3 depends on file: /usr/local/bin/ocamlc - found
/bin/rm -f -r /usr/home/ports/main.ports/devel/coccinelle/work/coccinelle-1.3/bundles/stdcompat/stdcompat-current
(cd /usr/home/ports/main.ports/devel/coccinelle/work/stdcompat-d53390d788027fe0a2282c4745eb3d1626341f99 && /bin/sh -c '(/usr/bin/find -Ed $1 $3 | /usr/bin/cpio -dumpl $2 >/dev/null 2>&1) &&  /usr/bin/find -Ed $1 $3 \(   -type d -exec /bin/sh -c '\''cd '\''$2'\'' && chmod 755 "$@"'\'' . {} +  -o -type f -exec /bin/sh -c '\''cd '\''$2'\'' && chmod 0644 "$@"'\'' . {} + \)' COPYTREE_SHARE .  /usr/home/ports/main.ports/devel/coccinelle/work/coccinelle-1.3/bundles/stdcompat/stdcompat-current)
===>  Patching for coccinelle-1.3
===>   coccinelle-1.3 depends on file: /usr/local/bin/ocamlc - found
find: tools/cppcheck.sh: No such file or directory
*** Error code 1

Stop.

Please make sure your patches are tested.  Please check and resubmit.
